title: End-to-End Financial Workflow Automation
summary: Integrated and automated financial workflows to improve control, efficiency, and process reliability.
problemStatement: Financial processes were fragmented, manual, and lacked real-time tracking.
solution: Designed integrated workflows across invoicing, procurement, and receivables, automated task creation and tracking, and built connected monitoring systems.
impact: Reduced manual effort and turnaround time, improved financial visibility and control, and increased process consistency.
leadershipValue: Demonstrates ability to build scalable control systems critical for financial discipline.

interactionFiles.label: Interactive case brief
interactionFiles.description: View the finance workflow architecture, process controls, and monitoring approach.
